name: VibroSense Python Training Pipeline
description: CWRU Bearing Dataset feature extraction + single-layer perceptron training. Features MUST match analog filter specs (2nd-order Butterworth, same bands). Weights quantized to 4-bit after training.
margin_rule: Float32 accuracy >92%, INT4 accuracy >88%, quantization loss <5pp

float32_accuracy_pct.description: 4-class classification accuracy with float32 weights on CWRU test set

quantization_loss_pp.description: Accuracy drop from float32 to INT4

analog_sim_accuracy_pct.description: Accuracy when tested with analog-simulated feature vectors vs Python golden
